depth_guidance.deep: Detailed analysis of the arc including competing emplotments and moments where the narrative and argumentative structures diverge.
depth_guidance.standard: Map the full narrative arc with turning points, opening gambit, and closure strategy.
depth_guidance.surface: Identify the dominant emplotment mode and 2-3 key turning points.

analytical_dimensions.description: The overall narrative structure — emplotment mode, turning points, opening and closure strategies.
probing_questions: What type of story does this text tell (romance, tragedy, comedy, satire)?
Where are the narrative turning points — crises, reversals, revelations?
How does the text establish its narrative contract with the reader?
How does it achieve or refuse closure?

depth_guidance.deep: Full register analysis including shifts within chapters, the relationship between register and argument quality, and what unconscious register shifts reveal.
depth_guidance.standard: Map all significant registers with their locations and functions.
depth_guidance.surface: Identify the dominant register and any major shifts.

analytical_dimensions.description: The registers and voices the text deploys — analytical, polemical, confessional, prophetic, ironic — and where each dominates.
probing_questions: What registers does the author deploy and where?
Are register shifts strategic or unconscious?
Do different registers serve different argumentative functions?

depth_guidance.deep: Detailed focalization analysis including the relationship between perspective choices and the argument's blind spots.
depth_guidance.standard: Map focalization patterns including shifts and excluded perspectives.
depth_guidance.surface: Identify the primary narrator stance and any major perspective shifts.

analytical_dimensions.description: Whose perspective is centered, when focalization shifts, and whose viewpoint is marginalized or excluded.
probing_questions: Whose perspective does the narrator primarily adopt?
When and why does focalization shift?
Whose viewpoint is systematically excluded?

depth_guidance.deep: Comprehensive analysis of how narrative tensions relate to the argument's strengths and weaknesses.
depth_guidance.standard: Map major tensions with their management strategies.
depth_guidance.surface: Identify the most prominent narrative tension.

analytical_dimensions.description: Where the text's narrative pulls in competing directions — between story and argument, between registers, between coherence and honesty.
probing_questions: Where do the demands of narrative conflict with the demands of argument?
Are there unresolved narrative tensions that the text tries to paper over?
Where do competing narrative impulses create productive or destructive ambiguity?

depth_guidance.deep: Full analysis of the device repertoire including how devices relate to the text's overall narrative strategy.
depth_guidance.standard: Catalog devices with their functions and effectiveness.
depth_guidance.surface: List the most prominent narrative devices.

analytical_dimensions.description: The specific narrative devices deployed — anecdotes, case studies as stories, historical vignettes, hypothetical scenarios, counterfactuals.
probing_questions: What narrative devices does the text deploy?
How effectively do they serve the argument?
Where do narrative devices substitute for argumentative rigor?

depth_guidance.deep: Full temporal analysis including competing temporalities and what the temporal frame reveals about the text's implicit philosophy of history.
depth_guidance.standard: Map temporal construction including scales, deixis, and past-present-future relationships.
depth_guidance.surface: Identify the dominant temporality and the text's relationship to its present.

analytical_dimensions.description: How the text constructs its relationship to time — linear, cyclical, genealogical, dialectical — and what the temporal frame reveals.
probing_questions: What is the text's dominant temporality?
What time scales are deployed and for what purposes?
When is "now" in this text — what present does it write from?
How does it construct the relationship between past, present, and future?

depth_guidance.deep: Detailed tracking of how narrative, register, and device use evolve, with analysis of what the evolution reveals.
depth_guidance.standard: Map the narrative evolution chapter by chapter.
depth_guidance.surface: Note any major shifts in narrative mode between sections.

analytical_dimensions.description: How the narrative mode, register, and devices evolve across the text's chapters.
probing_questions: Does the narrative mode shift as the text progresses?
Are register shifts between chapters deliberate or accidental?
Is there a narrative progression (e.g., from descriptive to prescriptive)?

depth_scaling.deep: Detailed arc analysis including competing emplotments and arc-argument divergences.
depth_scaling.standard: Full arc mapping with opening, turning points, and closure.
depth_scaling.surface: Identify emplotment mode and key turning points.

capabilities.description: Identifies the overall emplotment mode and maps the text's narrative arc — turning points, opening, closure.
capabilities.extended_description: Following White's metahistorical approach, determines what kind of story the text tells and how its narrative structure shapes what can be argued.
indicators: Opening gambit establishing the narrative contract
Turning points where the narrative shifts direction
Moments of crisis, reversal, or revelation

intellectual_grounding.method: Classify the text's narrative mode (romance, tragedy, comedy, satire) and trace the arc of its unfolding.

depth_scaling.deep: Full analysis including unconscious register shifts and register-argument relationships.
depth_scaling.standard: Map all registers with locations and functions.
depth_scaling.surface: Identify dominant register and major shifts.

capabilities.description: Maps the registers and voices deployed throughout the text.
capabilities.extended_description: Identifies analytical, polemical, confessional, prophetic, ironic, and other registers, tracking where they appear and what functions they serve.
indicators: Changes in sentence structure and rhythm
Deployment of specialized vs. everyday language

intellectual_grounding.method: Identify the competing voices and registers within the text and analyze their interactions.

depth_scaling.deep: Detailed analysis linking focalization choices to the argument's blind spots.
depth_scaling.standard: Map focalization patterns and excluded perspectives.
depth_scaling.surface: Identify primary narrator stance and obvious perspective limitations.

capabilities.description: Analyzes whose perspective is centered, how focalization shifts, and whose viewpoint is excluded.
capabilities.extended_description: Following Genette, maps the text's focalization patterns — who sees, who knows, whose perspective is privileged or marginalized.
indicators: Shifts between insider and outsider perspective
Claims to privileged knowledge or objectivity

intellectual_grounding.method: Trace the narrator's perceptual and cognitive relationship to the narrated events/arguments.

depth_scaling.deep: Comprehensive tension analysis relating narrative tensions to argumentative strengths/weaknesses.
depth_scaling.standard: Map major tensions with management strategies.

capabilities.description: Identifies where the text's narrative pulls in competing directions.
capabilities.extended_description: Maps the productive and destructive tensions between competing narrative impulses — story vs. argument, different registers, coherence vs. honesty.
indicators: Moments where the story seems to pull away from the argument
Register shifts that don't serve clear argumentative purposes
Unresolved tensions that the text tries to paper over

intellectual_grounding.method: Identify where the demands of narrative form conflict with the demands of argumentative rigor.

depth_scaling.deep: Full analysis of the device repertoire and its relationship to overall narrative strategy.

capabilities.description: Catalogs the specific narrative devices deployed and assesses their effectiveness.
capabilities.extended_description: Identifies anecdotes, case studies as stories, historical vignettes, hypothetical scenarios, counterfactuals, and other narrative devices, analyzing their function and effectiveness.

intellectual_grounding.method: Analyze narrative devices as rhetorical instruments serving persuasive purposes.

depth_scaling.deep: Full temporal analysis including competing temporalities and implicit philosophy of history.
depth_scaling.standard: Map temporal construction with scales and relationships.
depth_scaling.surface: Identify dominant temporality and temporal stance.

capabilities.description: Maps how the text constructs its relationship to time.
capabilities.extended_description: Analyzes the text's temporal framework — linear, cyclical, genealogical, dialectical — and what it reveals about the argument's implicit philosophy of history.

intellectual_grounding.method: Analyze how the text configures temporal experience through its narrative structure.

depth_scaling.deep: Detailed tracking with analysis of what evolution reveals about the text's developmental logic.

capabilities.description: Tracks how narrative mode, register, and devices evolve across the text's chapters.
capabilities.extended_description: Maps the narrative trajectory of the text — how its storytelling evolves from beginning to end, revealing the text's developmental logic.

intellectual_grounding.method: Track shifts in narrative mode across the text's structure.

consumes_from.chapter_argument_map: From deep_summarization — chapter functions inform narrative evolution tracking.
consumes_from.thesis_architecture: From deep_summarization — narrative analysis benefits from knowing the argument structure.

shares_with.narrative_arc: Provides narrative structure for rhetorical_strategy_analyzer and critical_apparatus_analyzer.
shares_with.narrative_voice_register: Reveals register patterns useful for audience_positioning_analyzer and rhetorical_strategy_analyzer.
shares_with.temporal_construction: Informs concept_evolution and historical_temporal engines with temporal framework.

depth_levels.description: Quick narrative read — emplotment, dominant register, and temporal stance.

passes.description: Discover the dominant narrative mode, register patterns, and temporal construction.
passes.label: Narrative Discovery

depth_levels.description: Balanced narrative analysis — discovery followed by dialectical assessment of tensions.

passes.description: Comprehensive discovery of narrative elements — arc, voice, focalization, devices, temporal construction.
passes.label: Narrative Discovery

passes.description: With narrative elements mapped, assess tensions and track how the narrative evolves across chapters.
passes.label: Dialectical Narrative Assessment

depth_levels.description: Exhaustive narrative analysis — four passes covering discovery, architecture, dialectical assessment, and integration.

passes.description: Exhaustive discovery of all narrative elements.
passes.label: Narrative Discovery

passes.description: Build the narrative architecture — how arc, voice, and evolution interact structurally.
passes.label: Narrative Architecture

passes.description: Dialectically assess narrative tensions and focalization patterns — where does narrative conflict with argument?
passes.label: Dialectical Narrative Assessment

passes.description: Integrate all findings into a comprehensive narrative analysis that reveals how the text's storytelling relates to its argumentation.
passes.label: Narrative Integration

depth_levels.suitable_for: Complex monographs, texts with rich narrative structures, scholarly works that deploy narrative strategically.

key_concepts.definition: White's concept for the narrative structuring of events into a story — the selection of a narrative mode (romance, tragedy, comedy, satire) that determines how events are organized, what counts as a beginning/middle/end, and what kind of meaning the sequence produces.
key_concepts.name: emplotment

key_concepts.definition: Genette's concept for the relationship between the narrator and the characters or events narrated — who sees (perceptual focalization) and who knows (cognitive focalization). In academic texts, this translates to whose perspective is centered, what the narrator claims to know, and whose viewpoint is marginalized.
key_concepts.name: focalization

key_concepts.definition: Bakhtin's concept for the multiplicity of voices within any text — even apparently monological scholarly prose contains competing discourses, registers, and speech genres that create internal dialogism.
key_concepts.name: heteroglossia

key_concepts.definition: The productive conflict between competing narrative impulses within a text — between story and argument, between different registers, between the demands of narrative coherence and analytical precision.
key_concepts.name: narrative_tension

key_concepts.definition: How a text constructs its relationship to time — whether it presents events as linear progression, cyclical return, genealogical descent, dialectical movement, or catastrophic rupture, and what this temporal frame reveals about the text's implicit philosophy of history.
key_concepts.name: temporal_construction

primary.description: Hayden White (1928-2018), American historian and literary critic whose Metahistory demonstrated that all historical writing is structured by narrative patterns (emplotment) — romance, tragedy, comedy, satire — that shape what can be said and how it's received. His work revealed that the choice of narrative mode is itself an interpretive act, not a neutral container for content, fundamentally reshaping how we understand the relationship between narrative and argument in scholarly writing.
primary.name: white

secondary.description: Gérard Genette (1930-2018), French literary theorist whose Narrative Discourse provided the foundational vocabulary for analyzing narrative structure — focalization (who sees), voice (who speaks), temporal ordering (what comes when), and mood (at what distance). His technical apparatus enables precise analysis of narrative choices that would otherwise remain invisible.
secondary.name: genette

secondary.description: Mikhail Bakhtin (1895-1975), Russian literary theorist whose concepts of heteroglossia (multiple voices within a text), dialogism (every utterance responds to prior utterances), and chronotope (the inseparability of time and space in narrative) provide tools for analyzing the polyphonic dimension of academic texts — the competing voices that inhabit even apparently monological scholarly prose.
secondary.name: bakhtin

secondary.description: Paul Ricoeur (1913-2005), French philosopher whose Time and Narrative demonstrated the deep connection between temporal experience and narrative structure, arguing that narrative is the primary means by which humans make sense of time — essential for understanding how academic texts construct their relationship to past, present, and future.
secondary.name: ricoeur

secondary.description: Wayne C. Booth (1921-2005), American literary critic whose The Rhetoric of Fiction analyzed how narrative techniques serve persuasive purposes — the implied author, the unreliable narrator, and the relationship between narrator and audience — providing tools for understanding the persuasive dimension of narrative choices in academic texts.
secondary.name: booth

traditions.description: The formal study of narrative structure and its effects, drawing on structuralist and post-structuralist traditions to analyze how stories are constructed, what choices are made in their telling, and what those choices reveal about the narrator's commitments, assumptions, and rhetorical strategies.
traditions.name: narratology

traditions.description: White's approach to historical writing as structured by literary forms, revealing that the choice of emplotment (romance, tragedy, comedy, satire) is itself an interpretive act that shapes what can be said and how it's received — applicable to any extended scholarly argument that deploys historical narrative.
traditions.name: metahistory

traditions.description: The tradition from Iser and Jauss analyzing how texts construct their implied reader, create gaps and indeterminacies that the reader must fill, and manage the reader's expectations — essential for understanding how academic texts manage their audience's interpretive trajectory.
traditions.name: reception_theory

traditions.description: The analysis of how language use in context constructs social realities, positioning speakers and hearers in particular relationships — applicable to understanding how academic texts construct their narrative authority and manage register shifts.
traditions.name: discourse_analysis

problematique:
Every academic text tells a story, even when it claims to merely present
arguments. The narrative dimension — how authors construct temporal sequences,
deploy voice, shift between registers, use storytelling as persuasive
instrument — is analytically distinct from both logical structure and
rhetorical strategy. A text may be logically impeccable and rhetorically
effective while telling a story that undermines its own conclusions, or
deploy a narrative mode that reveals commitments the explicit argument
denies.

Hayden White demonstrated that historical writing is always emplotted —
organized according to narrative patterns (romance, tragedy, comedy, satire)
that shape what can be said and how it's received. Genette showed that
narrative is structured through focalization (whose perspective), temporal
ordering (what comes when and why), and voice (who speaks and from where).
Bakhtin revealed that texts are never monological but contain multiple
competing voices (heteroglossia) even when they appear to speak with one.

For academic texts, the narrative dimension is especially revealing because
it's the layer authors are least conscious of controlling. An author who
carefully constructs their logical argument may unconsciously adopt a
prophetic voice that reveals messianic assumptions, or shift between
analytical and confessional registers in ways that expose the personal
stakes behind the scholarly claims. The gap between a text's explicit
argumentative structure and its implicit narrative structure is often
where the most analytically productive tensions reside.
researcher_question: How does this text construct its narrative, and what does the narrative structure reveal about the argument?
